member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider
member.summary: This interface is responsbile for persisting data/state to blockchain storage providers.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider.CreateAccountAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new account and returns the public key, private key, and seed phrase.
member.param: A cancellation token to support cancellation of the operation.
member.returns: A tuple containing the public key, private key, and seed phrase of the created account.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider.RestoreAccountAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores an existing account using a seed phrase, returning the public and private keys.
member.param: The seed phrase used to restore the account.
A cancellation token to support cancellation of the operation.
member.returns: A tuple containing the public key and private key of the restored account.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider.WithdrawAsync(System.Decimal,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initiates a withdrawal of a specified amount from an account.
member.param: The address of the account to withdraw from.
The private key of the client initiating the withdrawal.
member.returns: A response containing the transaction details of the withdrawal.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider.DepositAsync(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Initiates a deposit of a specified amount into an account.
member.param: The address of the account to deposit to.
member.returns: A response containing the transaction details of the deposit.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISBlockchainStorageProvider.GetTransactionStatusAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the status of a transaction using its transaction hash.
member.param: The hash of the transaction to check the status of.
A cancellation token to support cancellation of the operation.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISNFTProvider.WithdrawNFTAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Withdraws an NFT from the source chain (locks it for cross-chain transfer).
member.param: The address of the NFT token contract.
The unique token ID of the NFT.
The address of the account owning the NFT.
The private key of the account.
member.returns: A response containing the transaction details of the NFT withdrawal/lock.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISNFTProvider.DepositNFTAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deposits an NFT to the destination chain (mints wrapped NFT or unlocks original).
member.param: The address of the NFT token contract on destination chain.
The unique token ID (may be different on destination if wrapped).
The address of the account to receive the NFT.
The transaction hash from the source chain withdrawal (for verification).
member.returns: A response containing the transaction details of the NFT deposit/mint.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IOASISSuperStar.NativeCodeGenesis(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.ICelestialBody,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Allows a provider to generate any native code/artifacts it needs for a given OAPP/celestial body. For example, the HoloOASIS provider can generate Rust DNA/zome code into the specified output folder using the supplied source/template information.
member.param: The root celestial body for the OAPP (may be null for ZomesAndHolonsOnly).
The root folder where generated code for this OAPP is being written.
Optional custom params for the provider generator.
member.returns: True if generation succeeded, otherwise false.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IObjective

member.summary: Computed progress summary built from requirement/progress dictionaries (e.g. "Killed 1/10 monsters in ODOOM (10%)").

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IObjective.LinkedGeoHotSpotId
member.summary: Optional GeoHotSpot to visit or trigger for this objective (e.g. media/text/link hotspot).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IObjective.ExternalHandoffUri
member.summary: Optional URI for cross-app handoff (STAR CLI, OPortal, Telegram, web task, etc.).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IQuestBase.GameSource
member.summary: Game (e.g. Doom, Quake) this quest/objective applies to. Used when quest is a sub-quest/objective.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IQuestBase.Objectives
member.summary: Objectives belonging to this quest (Option B: own class, not child Quests). Persisted as part of the Quest holon.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IQuestBase.LinkedGeoHotSpotId
member.summary: Optional GeoHotSpot tied to this quest (quest-level anchor; objectives may add their own).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IQuestBase.ExternalHandoffUri
member.summary: Optional URI for cross-app / cross-game handoff (OPortal, CLI, messaging, web).

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IQuestObjectiveDictionaries
member.summary: Requirement and progress dictionaries keyed by game id (e.g. ODOOM, OQUAKE). Value = list of strings (e.g. type names, counts, identifiers). Shared by IObjective (per-objective) and IQuestBase (quest-level totals).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.ISTARNETDNA.STARNETSubCategory
member.summary: Sub-category for libraries (e.g., Language). Shown as "Language" in UI/wizards.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Objects.NFT.Web4OASISGeoSpatialNFT.AllowOtherPlayersToAlsoCollect
member.summary: If true this NFT will still be visible for other players to collect even if another player has already collected it.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Objects.NFT.Web4OASISGeoSpatialNFT.PermSpawn
member.summary: If true this NFT will always be present on the map no matter how many times it is collected by any player.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Objects.NFT.Web4OASISGeoSpatialNFT.GlobalSpawnQuantity
member.summary: The number of times this NFT can be collected in total for all players. Set to -1 for infinite. This is only applicable if AllowOtherPlayersToAlsoCollect is set to true.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Objects.NFT.Web4OASISGeoSpatialNFT.PlayerSpawnQuantity
member.summary: The number of times this NFT can be collected per player. Set to -1 for infinite. GlobalSpawnQuantity takes priority (if it is 0 then PlayerSpawnQuantity is used).

member.summary: The Blockchain to store the token on.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Objects.NFT.NFTBase.OffChainProvider
member.summary: Where the meta data is stored for the NFT (JSON Meta file and associated media etc) - For example HoloOASIS or IPFSOASIS etc.

member.summary: The Blockchain to store the token on.

member.summary: Sends an item from the sender's inventory to another avatar (or to a clan when forClan is true). Target can be username or avatar Id (as string). When itemId is provided, that specific item is sent; otherwise items are matched by name. When forClan is true, target is treated as clan name and result messages use "clan" wording (e.g. "Clan not found").

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Managers.Bridge.Interfaces.IOASISBridge
member.summary: Defines a generic interface for interacting with blockchain bridges, allowing operations such as creating and restoring accounts, checking balances, making deposits and withdrawals, and checking transaction statuses. This interface is designed to be adaptable for any blockchain network (e.g., Solana, Radix, Ethereum, etc.).

M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Managers.HolonManager.ExtractCustomPropertiesToMetaData(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IHolon)
member.summary: Copies [CustomOASISProperty] fields from the holon into its MetaData so providers persist them (e.g. AvatarDetail.ActiveQuestId, ActiveObjectiveId). Call before saving a holon when the save path does not go through SaveHolon (e.g. SaveAvatarDetailAsync).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Managers.HolonManager.SendHolon``1(System.Guid,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Enums.ProviderType,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Enums.ProviderType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Send's a given holon from one provider to another. This method is only really needed if auto-replication is disabled or there is a use case for sending from one provider to another. By default this will NOT auto-replicate to any other provider (set autoReplicate to true if you wish it to). This param overrides the global auto-replication setting.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Managers.OASISHyperDrive.OASISHyperDrive._usageCounters
member.summary: Real in-process usage counters for quota enforcement, keyed by "{operationType}:{yyyy-MM}" so usage rolls over monthly (matching SubscriptionConfig.BillingCycle = "Monthly"). Shared across all OASISHyperDrive instances (the class is constructed fresh per request by callers like AvatarManager/ HolonManager) via this static field, so quota actually accumulates instead of always reading 0.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Managers.ProviderManager
member.summary:
⚠️ OBSOLETE WARNING: This ProviderManager class is being refactored for better separation of concerns.
NEW ARCHITECTURE: - ProviderRegistry: Manages provider registration and basic operations - ProviderSelector: Handles all provider selection algorithms - ProviderSwitcher: Manages provider switching logic - ProviderConfigurator: Handles provider configuration and lists - ProviderManagerNew: Acts as a facade/orchestrator
MIGRATION PATH: 1. Use the new facade methods (ending with "New") for immediate access to new system 2. Gradually migrate to direct usage of specialized classes 3. This class will be deprecated once all dependencies are migrated
BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: All existing methods remain functional during transition period.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.OASISRequestContext
member.summary: Request-scoped ambient context for the current avatar. Set by WEB4/WEB5 middleware per request. AvatarManager.LoggedInAvatar reads this first, then falls back to static. Uses AsyncLocal so each concurrent request has its own value (safe for multiple clients).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.OASISRequestContext.CurrentAvatar
member.summary: The avatar for the current async request flow. Set by API middleware; clear when request ends.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.OASISRequestContext.CurrentAvatarId
member.summary: The avatar id for the current async request flow. Set by API middleware when avatar not loaded; clear when request ends.
